text.title: Serverless IaC and Templates Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the serverless-iac-and-templates methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: pick-tool
step.action: Score SAM / CDK / Serverless Framework / Pulumi / Terraform on fit, team skill, multi-cloud need, ecosystem.

step.name: scaffold-template
step.action: Generate base template + stage config file (samconfig.toml / tfvars / cdk.json).

step.name: scope-iam
step.action: Author per-function least-privilege roles; lint for wildcards.

step.name: wire-pipeline
step.action: Add validate + lint + deploy + drift-detect jobs in CI.

step.name: add-static-scanners
step.action: Wire cfn-nag / tfsec / checkov in CI; configure severity gates.

step.name: deploy-and-detect-drift
step.action: Run end-to-end deploy + drift-detect; verify alerts fire on a synthetic drift.
